title: CVE-2010-2417 — CVSS 4.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2010-2417

CVSS Score: 4.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2010-10-14T02:00:02.617
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the Agile PLM component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 9.3.0.0 allows remote authenticated users to affect integrity via unknown vectors.

References: http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuoct2010-175626.html, http://www.us-cert.gov/cas/techalerts/TA10-287A.html, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuoct2010-175626.html
